data.description: Beachwood, Ohio - SITE Centers is set to release its earnings report for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, May 7, 2026. Stay tuned for updates on the financial performance of the company during this period.

data.title: KB HOME DECLARES SECOND QUARTER 2026 DIVIDEND
data.description: In Los Angeles on April 23, 2026, KB Home (NYSE: KBH) announced a cash dividend of $.25 per share on their common stock. This quarterly dividend will be paid on May 21, 2026, to stockholders recorded on May 7, 2026. KB Home, a prominent company, is known for being one of the largest in the industry.

data.title: Motorola Solutions to Issue First-Quarter 2026 Earnings Results on May 7
data.description: Chicago-based company Motorola Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: MSI) is set to announce its first-quarter 2026 earnings on May 7 after the market closes. A conference call with financial analysts will follow at 4 p.m. Central Time (5 p.m. Eastern Time) on the same day. The call can be accessed via live webcast at motorolasolutions.com/investors. Motorola Solutions is known for its focus on safety and security solutions.

data.title: Atomera Extends Collaboration With Synopsys to Accelerate GaN Modeling in High-Value RF and Power Devices
data.description: Atomera Incorporated, a company specializing in semiconductor materials and technology licensing, has revealed an enhanced partnership with Synopsys, Inc., a prominent provider of engineering solutions. This collaboration aims to push forward gallium nitride (GaN) device modeling for radio frequency (RF) and power semiconductor applications. Atomera’s MSTcad™ toolset and Synopsys’ Sentaurus™ TCAD will be utilized in this endeavor. Through this initiative, the companies leverage their existing relationship to drive innovation in this area. Atomera's stock is listed on the NASDAQ exchange under the ticker symbol ATOM. The collaboration underlines the companies' dedication to advancing semiconductor technology.

data.description: In a recent update, it was reported that the rate of COVID-19 infections has increased by approximately 15% in the past week. The total number of confirmed cases now stands at over 10,000, with over 500 new cases recorded daily. Additionally, the number of deaths due to the virus has risen to 150. This surge in cases has led to a strain on the healthcare system, with hospitals operating at 85% capacity. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines to curb the spread of the virus.

data.title: BOYD GAMING REPORTS FIRST-QUARTER 2026 RESULTS
data.description: In their latest update on April 23, 2026, Boyd Gaming Corporation (NYSE: BYD) announced their financial performance for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026. Keith Smith, who serves as the President and Chief Executive Officer of Boyd Gaming, shared his insights on the results. The report highlighted key figures and outcomes of the company's operations during this period, signaling positive outcomes and growth prospects.

data.title: ROBERT HALF REPORTS FIRST-QUARTER FINANCIAL RESULTS
data.description: On April 23, 2026, Robert Half Inc. (NYSE: RHI) based in Menlo Park, California, released their financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The net income for this period was $14 million, equivalent to $0.14 per share, achieved from revenues totaling $1.300 billion.

data.title: MAGYAR BANCORP, INC. ANNOUNCES SECOND QUARTER FINANCIAL RESULTS AND DECLARES DIVIDEND
data.description: In a recent announcement, Magyar Bancorp (NASDAQ: MGYR) based in New Brunswick, N.J., disclosed its financial results for the three and six months concluding on March 31, 2026. The parent company of Magyar Bank revealed a notable 13% growth in net income during the three-month period.

data.title: SouthState Bank Corporation Reports First Quarter 2026 Results, Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: Winter Haven, Florida - SouthState Bank Corporation, also known as SouthState, shared its unaudited financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The report covers the period ended on March 31, 2026. SouthState is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol SSB. The company announced the results on April 23, 2026. The financial report indicates the performance of SouthState Bank Corporation over the three-month period, highlighting key numbers and information for investors and stakeholders. data.title: Genpact Limited Board Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: On April 23, 2026, Genpact (NYSE: G), a leading technology solutions company known for industry expertise and advanced capabilities, declared a cash dividend of $0.1875 per share. This decision was made by the company's board of directors.
